title: User asks how to create a purchase order — must disambiguate which kind
user_persona: A buyer who knows they want to create something but doesn't know which create journey

conversation.user: How do I create a purchase order?

bot_must: list the 5 create variants with one-line explanations: PoCrt (direct, no source doc), PoCrtQtn (from a quotation), PoCrtSo (from a sale order, dropship), PoCrtTen (from a tender), PoCopy (clone an existing PO)
ask which one the user wants

conversation.user: I have a quote from a supplier already, I want to convert that

bot_must: explain the first step is a search on the entry screen — bot will ask for either quotation_no or a search filter (supplier, status=Approved)
if found: report quotation found and ask which line(s) to include in the PO; if not found: say so and offer to widen the search

conversation.notes: POCRTQTNTRN1 is the Search task on the entry screen — fires before main create

expected_terminal_state.po_status: search complete, main not yet entered

evaluation_metrics.disambiguation_at_turn_1: bot must enumerate >=4 of 5 create variants before locking any
evaluation_metrics.journey_lock_correctness: PoCrtQtn locked only at turn 2 after user's explicit signal
